missionDescription: Immediate containment required for Biological Asset Princess. Asset has breached confinement. Warning: Asset possesses razor-sharp claws and sneaking capabilities. Previous handler on sick leave.

title: Here Kitty, Kitty
summary: Director Van Doren's genetically modified pet 'Princess' (a six-legged, chameleon-scaled sloth-cat) has escaped into the Zero-G ventilation shafts after eating a bag of synthetic stimulants.

cast.name: Dir. Van Doren
cast.want: Princess returned without a single scratched scale.

scenes: The 'Stolen Property' isn't data; it's a bag of high-grade 'Zoom' dust. Princess is currently vibrating and bouncing off the walls of the Zero-G shaft at high velocity. The players must catch a hyper-active space cat, while the Director screams over comms every time they bump her.
reward: Favor: Van Doren owes you one. (Good for getting out of jail once).
